response.global_analysis: The video contains the latter half of the song 'Ikenai Taiyou' followed by an MC segment. The reference JSON lyrics for 'Ikenai Taiyou' were used as a base, but adjusted to match the gender-swapped vocals ('Watashi' instead of 'Ore' in some parts) and the specific verses performed. The MC segment features introductions from Amamiya Pururu, Akami Karubi (who jokes about being Aki's 'legal wife' or 'seishitsu'), and Zuzu (who performs a rhyming rap introduction). Timestamps are precisely aligned with vocal starts and ends, and long sentences are split to maintain readability and sync.

subtitles.original: 濡れた髪を撫でた
subtitles.english: I stroked your wet hair

subtitles.original: そして Ah...
subtitles.english: And then, ah...

subtitles.original: ABC 続かない
subtitles.english: ABC, it doesn't continue

subtitles.original: そんなんじゃダメじゃない
subtitles.english: It's no good like that, is it?

subtitles.original: だって心の奥は違うんじゃない？
subtitles.english: Cause the depths of your heart are different, aren't they?

subtitles.original: 俺の青春そんなもんじゃない
subtitles.english: My youth isn't something like that

subtitles.original: 熱く奥で果てたいよ
subtitles.english: I want to go all the way in the heat

subtitles.original: きっと君じゃなきゃやだよ
subtitles.english: It's got to be you, no one else will do

subtitles.original: 俺はイケナイ太陽
subtitles.english: I'm the naughty sun

subtitles.original: 赤い糸なんて空事
subtitles.english: A red thread of fate is just a fabrication

subtitles.original: でも下心でさえ信じたいな
subtitles.english: But I want to believe even in ulterior motives

subtitles.original: 俺は正しい 君も正しい
subtitles.english: I'm right, you're right

subtitles.original: とにかくもう左右されないぜ
subtitles.english: Anyway, I won't be swayed anymore

subtitles.original: 騙し騙され胸うずく
subtitles.english: Deceiving and being deceived, my chest aches

subtitles.original: お芝居がより盛り上げるよ
subtitles.english: The acting will liven things up even more

subtitles.original: 息が耳に触れた二人
subtitles.english: Our breaths touched our ears, the two of us

subtitles.original: ABC 続かない そんなんじゃダメじゃない
subtitles.english: ABC, it doesn't continue. It's no good like that, is it?

subtitles.original: だって心の奥は違うんじゃない？
subtitles.english: Cause the depths of your heart are different, aren't they?

subtitles.original: 私の青春そんなもんじゃない
subtitles.english: My youth isn't something like that

subtitles.original: 熱く奥で果てたいよ
subtitles.english: I want to go all the way in the heat

subtitles.original: きっと君じゃなきゃやだよ
subtitles.english: It's got to be you, no one else will do

subtitles.original: 私はイケナイ太陽
subtitles.english: I'm the naughty sun

subtitles.original: 交わす言葉の記憶遠く
subtitles.english: Memories of the words we exchanged are far away

subtitles.original: 口元の動きに揺れ動く
subtitles.english: Trembling at the movement of your lips

subtitles.original: 濡れた髪を撫でた
subtitles.english: I stroked your wet hair

subtitles.original: そして Ah...
subtitles.english: And then, ah...

subtitles.original: ABC 続かない そんなんじゃダメじゃない
subtitles.english: ABC, it doesn't continue. It's no good like that, is it?

subtitles.original: だって心の奥は違うんじゃない？
subtitles.english: Cause the depths of your heart are different, aren't they?

subtitles.original: 俺たちの青春そんなもんじゃない
subtitles.english: Our youth isn't something like that

subtitles.original: 熱く奥で果てたいよ
subtitles.english: I want to go all the way in the heat

subtitles.original: きっと君じゃなきゃやだよ
subtitles.english: It's got to be you, no one else will do

subtitles.original: 俺はイケナイ太陽
subtitles.english: I'm the naughty sun

subtitles.original: 絡み合う糸は君と
subtitles.english: The intertwining threads are with you

subtitles.original: 俺を結ぶ赤い糸
subtitles.english: The red thread that binds me

subtitles.original: ということで、お友達が来てくれたので
subtitles.english: So, since friends have come,

subtitles.original: せっかくなので自己紹介してもらおうと思います！
subtitles.english: I'd like to have them introduce themselves!

subtitles.original: まずは、ぷるるんちゃんから！
subtitles.english: First, from Pururun-chan!

subtitles.original: はーい！おはぷる！
subtitles.english: Hi! Oha-Puru!

subtitles.original: 天使と悪魔のハーフ、ぷるぷるエンジェルデビル、甘宮ぷるるです！
subtitles.english: Half angel, half devil, Puru Puru Angel Devil, Amamiya Pururu!

subtitles.original: 悪魔じゃー！お誕生日おめでとうー！
subtitles.english: I'm a devil! Happy birthday!

subtitles.original: ありがとうー！
subtitles.english: Thank you!

subtitles.original: とっても楽しかったー！
subtitles.english: It was so much fun!

subtitles.original: 続いて、カルビちゃん！
subtitles.english: Next up, Karubi-chan!

subtitles.original: はい！お肉の国のお姫様、赤見かるびです！
subtitles.english: Yes! Princess of the country of meat, Akami Karubi!

subtitles.original: アキの正室、誕生日おめでとう！
subtitles.english: Aki's legal wife, happy birthday!

subtitles.original: ありがとう！正室...
subtitles.english: Thank you! Legal wife...

subtitles.original: いいライブだね、友達とライブ初めてだからさ
subtitles.english: A great live show! It's my first time performing with friends,

subtitles.original: マジで嬉しかったよ。ありがとう、呼んでくれて。
subtitles.english: so I was really happy. Thanks for inviting me.

subtitles.original: またやろうぜ！
subtitles.english: Let's do it again!

subtitles.original: そして最後に、ずずさん！
subtitles.english: And finally, Zuzu-san!

subtitles.original: はい！僕のこと知らない人いると思うんで自己紹介だけさせてください！
subtitles.english: Yes! I think there are people who don't know me, so let me just introduce myself!

subtitles.original: 雨降ってザーザー、症状自体はジジイ
subtitles.english: The rain falls heavily, my symptoms are like an old man's,

subtitles.original: 俺の名前はずずずず、ずずでございます！
subtitles.english: my name is Zu-zu-zu-zu, Zuzu!

subtitles.original: お誕生日おめでとう！
subtitles.english: Happy birthday!
